title: Mc Kart
description: A resource pack that adds a few of Mario Kart's items into game, including karts!
body:
![The Image of the title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ac51ceed5c20897f60ddb42178a63ae6f0eae9a.png)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/tQOJqNjcYpE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# **Description**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

This resource pack may get updated in the future, for which it has some room to improve on.

</details>

 **This resource pack adds in the iconic _Mario Karts_ into vanilla minecraft! Alongside other gadgets to play with! **

 ## Additions:
 this resource pack replaces the following with the correspondant item listed below:

 > ### Blocks:
 > - **Slime Block: Launch Pads**
 > - **Smooth Basalt: Asphalt Road**
 > - **Ice: Rainbow Road**
 > - **Packed Ice: Asphalt Road**
 > - **Blue Ice: Dash Panel**
 > - **Cobwebs: Banana Peels**
 
 > ### Entities:
 > - **Boats(oak): Karts**
 > - **End Crystals: Mystery Blocks**
